## 检查清单 / Checklist
<!-- 在提交前确认以下事项 / Please confirm before submitting -->
- [ ] 文档结构符合模板 / Document structure follows template
- [ ] 数学符号遵循ISO 80000-2 / Math symbols follow ISO 80000-2
- [ ] 引用格式正确（ACM格式）/ References are in correct format (ACM)
- [ ] 代码示例可运行（如适用）/ Code examples are runnable (if applicable)
- [ ] 无拼写错误 / No spelling errors
- [ ] 交叉引用链接正确 / Cross-reference links are correct
- [ ] 双语标注完整 / Bilingual annotations are complete

## 测试情况 / Testing
<!-- 描述如何测试这些变更 / Describe how you tested these changes -->
- [ ] 本地预览检查 / Local preview checked
- [ ] 链接有效性检查 / Link validity checked
- [ ] 代码示例验证 / Code examples verified

## 关联Issue / Related Issues
<!-- 使用关键词关联Issue / Use keywords to link issues -->
Fixes #(issue number)
Resolves #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## 截图 / Screenshots
<!-- 如适用，提供变更前后的对比截图 / If applicable, provide before/after screenshots -->
